overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player driving a futuristic vehicle through a neon-lit cyberpunk city. The car travels under elevated highway structures past holographic advertisements and commercial buildings, then transitions through an intersection before entering an underground tunnel. The scene features high-fidelity ray-traced graphics with vibrant neon pinks, blues, and yellows contrasting against concrete infrastructure.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered urban street beneath elevated highway with neon commercial signage

agents.ego_description: driving steadily under elevated highway, following a red sports car ahead while passing neon-lit storefronts on the right

notable_agents.action: red sports car driving ahead in the same lane, maintaining steady speed
pedestrians standing on sidewalk near shopfronts, some looking at displays

entered.detail: massive concrete highway structure overhead with visible support beams and road surface above
large holographic billboards displaying pink, green, and blue neon advertisements in Japanese and English
thick cylindrical concrete pillars supporting the elevated highway structure
tall modern skyscrapers with reflective glass facades and geometric architectural details
ground-level commercial spaces with illuminated signage and display windows

segments.scene_description: The vehicle travels beneath a massive elevated highway deck through a neon-drenched commercial district. Holographic billboards in vibrant pinks and blues line the right side of the street, while concrete support pillars pass by on the left. Pedestrians gather near shopfronts on the sidewalk as the car follows a red sports car ahead.

events.description: exiting dense neon commercial district into wider intersection with large digital screens
slight rightward adjustment of steering to align with tunnel entrance ahead

agents.ego_description: navigating through intersection while approaching the illuminated tunnel entrance ahead, maintaining following distance from red car

notable_agents.action: red sports car continuing straight toward tunnel entrance, brake lights occasionally illuminating

entered.detail: building facade covered in massive LED screens displaying animated advertisements
concrete archway entrance to underground tunnel with glowing edge lighting
futuristic traffic signage suspended over the road indicating directions
zebra crossing markings on asphalt with yellow tactile paving strips

segments.scene_description: The environment opens into a wider intersection with large digital building facades replacing the dense neon signage. The vehicle approaches a concrete tunnel entrance glowing with edge lighting ahead. Crosswalk markings appear on the asphalt as the elevated highway structure recedes into the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: enclosed underground tunnel with concrete walls and artificial lighting

events.description: entering enclosed tunnel with transition from natural to artificial lighting
passing under bright fluorescent ceiling light fixtures creating alternating light and shadow

agents.ego_description: driving through the underground tunnel, navigating between concrete walls while following the red car toward the bright exit ahead

notable_agents.action: red sports car maintaining speed through tunnel, tail lights glowing red in the dim environment

entered.detail: concrete portal frame marking the transition from outdoor to indoor space
smooth gray concrete walls with horizontal construction joints and emergency lighting fixtures
linear fluorescent light fixtures mounted on tunnel ceiling providing artificial illumination
futuristic sports cars parked along the right wall of the tunnel structure
bright daylight visible at the far end of the tunnel indicating the exit portal

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters a dimly lit underground tunnel with smooth concrete walls and linear ceiling lights. Parked luxury vehicles line the right side as the car follows the red tail lights ahead toward a bright exit portal in the distance. The environment shifts from neon-lit urban chaos to the stark, utilitarian concrete enclosure of the tunnel.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective as a vehicle moves from a vibrant, neon-drenched commercial district into the stark enclosure of an underground tunnel. It begins beneath a massive elevated highway deck, gliding past concrete support pillars and holographic billboards in vivid pinks and blues while following a red sports car. As the vehicle reaches a wider intersection, the dense signage gives way to large digital building facades and the elevated structure recedes into the distance. The scene then shifts toward a glowing concrete entrance, crossing over asphalt markings before plunging into a dimly lit tunnel. Finally, the environment transforms into a utilitarian space of smooth concrete walls and linear ceiling lights, passing parked luxury vehicles while heading toward a bright exit portal.
